prompt.text: Ask the customer for their loan ID or customer ID before searching.
Review the loan application status and timeline. Click the advance button to see the full record.
Note the reason for the delay. Then select the correct next action below.
Review the processing policy. Select the appropriate resolution for this delay.
Confirm the action you will take. Add a case note, then click 'Confirm & Apply'.
Return to the customer tab and deliver the update below.

screenConfigs.title: Loan Application Search
screenConfigs.placeholder: Enter loan ID or customer ID...

screenConfigs.title: Delay Reason
screenConfigs.statusText: Income verification documents are required. Customer must resubmit pay stubs or recent bank statements before underwriting can proceed.

screenConfigs.title: Resolution Options
screenConfigs.policy:
LOAN PROCESSING POLICY – Personal Loans

Standard Processing Timeline
  • Application to decision:     5–7 business days (standard)
  • Document verification:       2–3 business days
  • Disbursement after approval: 1–2 business days

Delay Causes & Actions
  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │  Income Verification:  Request updated documents  │
  │  Credit Flag:          Escalate to Risk Team      │
  │  System Hold:          Escalate to Ops Support    │
  │  Missing Documents:    Send document request      │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Customer Communication Standard
  • Delays > 3 business days: proactive outreach required
  • Provide updated ETA and reason at every contact
  • Document all customer contacts in case notes
screenConfigs.correctMessage: Correct. Request updated income documents and provide a 5-day resubmission deadline.

screenConfigs.title: Apply Actions
screenConfigs.notePlaceholder: e.g. Customer called re: loan delay. Income verification required. Document request sent with 5-day deadline. ETA 3–5 days post-submission.

screenConfigs.title: Case Updated — Communicate to Customer
screenConfigs.script:
"Alex, I've looked into your loan application. It's currently in our underwriting review stage, and the delay is due to an additional income verification step required for your loan amount — this is a standard part of the process, not a rejection.

I've just sent a document request to your email. Once we receive your updated income documents, our team will aim to complete the review within 3 to 5 business days.

Is there anything else I can help clarify for you today?"
screenConfigs.resolution: Document request issued. 5-day deadline set. Customer informed of expected timeline.
